sections.education:
Vellore Institute Of Technology Vellore, India
Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology CGPA : 9.5/10 September 2022 - July 2026
sections.experience:
Founding Engineer Oct. 2025 – Jan. 2026
Lexpal – AI-Powered LegalTech Platform | Link Hyderabad, India
• Built a LegalTech platform where users can ask legal questions and find lawyers based on roles and expertise
• Developed a real-time chat system using WebSockets to ensure fast and smooth communication.
• Built a RAG-based system with vector search for accurate, context-aware responses with reduced hallucinations.
• Skills : React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, ChromaDB, OpenAI API, WebSockets, RAG Pipeline.
Project Intern June 2025 – July 2025
Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited | Certificate Hyderabad, India
• Built backend services using Spring Boot and REST APIs with optimized database interactions.
• Developed automated workflow routing system to streamline approvals and reduce manual effort.
• Implemented hierarchical RBAC enforcement to secure data access across organizational levels.
• Skills : React, RESTful APIs, Spring Boot, MySQL, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security.
Freelance Front-End Developer Feb. 2025 – March 2025
The House Of Pool Vellore, India
• Automated usage-based billing, reducing manual billing time by 80%.
• Built a system to sort and manage active and completed sessions in real time.
• Developed real-time inventory and sales tracking to keep data consistent and up to date.
• Optimized the system to handle 50+ users at once with fast and smooth performance.
• Skills : React, JavaScript, Real-time Data Sync, Firebase, MongoDB
sections.projects:
Recrut – AI-Native Hiring Platform | Link Nov. 2025 – Jan. 2026
• Developed an AI Shadow Interviewer that cross-questions candidates and analyzes responses in real time
• Implemented context passing so the AI interviewer remembers past responses for coherent multi-turn interactions.
• Implemented YOLO and OpenCV for proctoring and real-time eye tracking during interviews.
• Developed an in-browser coding IDE with real-time error checking and support for multiple languages.
• Skills : React, Electron, Node.js, Express.js, Prisma, Computer Vision, Generative AI, JWT(Auth).
Real-Time Event-Driven Attendance Engine | Link Dec. 2025 – Jan. 2026
• Built a scalable attendance pipeline to handle high traffic with low latency.
• Developed a fault-tolerant WebSocket system with stable connection handling.
• Skills : Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, WebSockets, REST APIs, JWT.
Cinepolis API Security Research | Puppeteer.js, Node.js, Postman Sept. 2025 – Oct. 2025
• Conducted controlled MITM testing to evaluate API security and data integrity
• Discovered and responsibly disclosed a backend validation flaw in Cinepolis India’s booking system.
Eagle View - Stock Market App | Link Jan. 2025 – Sept. 2025
• Built a real-time stock market dashboard to display live prices and insights with low delay.
• Deployed the application on AWS to ensure scalability and reliability.
• Developed a RAG-based system using LLMs and NLP to provide smarter, data-driven insights.
• Skills : RAG Pipeline, React , MongoDB, AWS, Express.js, NLP
Relevant Coursework
Core Computer Science: Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Management Systems, Computer Networks.
Web & Systems Engineering: Frontend & Backend Development, MERN Stack, RESTful APIs, System Design.
DevOps & Cloud: CI/CD Pipelines, AWS
sections.skills_text:

Frameworks: React, Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security
